TextView.android:text: Prevents accidental gestures from affecting gameplay.
Disable double tap to swap items in hands.
Adjust the time required to trigger long press actions.
Adjust the size of all on-screen buttons.
Display button labels in ALL CAPS.
Adjust the size of the virtual mouse cursor.
Adjust the movement speed of the mouse.
Start the virtual mouse when the game launches.
Use device gyroscope for camera control.
Adjust the sensitivity of the gyroscope.
Set gyroscope sample rate for smoother input.
Adjust the deadzone for analog sticks.
